overall.description: A ship simulator game depicting a vessel's bridge view during a nighttime storm at sea. The camera shows the bow of the ship cutting through choppy waters while navigation monitors display radar and chart data. A lightning flash illuminates the distant ocean, highlighting the stormy maritime environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: ship bridge navigating stormy coastal waters

agents.ego_description: operating the vessel through rough seas at night, monitoring the radar display and navigation charts

entered.detail: navigation display showing coastal chart with landmass on the left side
circular radar screen with rotating sweep arm showing navigation contacts
blue-tinted status display showing vessel systems information
the bow of the ship with metal railings and deck lighting visible ahead
vertical structural frame of the bridge window on the port side
vertical structural frame of the bridge window on the starboard side
dark choppy sea surface illuminated by the vessel's forward lights

segments.scene_description: The vessel cruises steadily through dark, turbulent waters at night. From the enclosed bridge, the foredeck is visible ahead cutting through the waves, while three navigation monitors display chart data, rotating radar, and system status. The artificial lighting from the instruments provides the primary illumination as the ship maintains course through the storm.

scene_state.functional_zone: ship bridge navigating stormy coastal waters

events.description: bright lightning flash illuminates the ocean surface on the starboard side, revealing storm intensity

agents.ego_description: maintaining vessel course through the storm while monitoring navigation displays as lightning strikes nearby

entered.detail: bright electrical discharge illuminating the distant ocean surface on the starboard side during the storm

segments.scene_description: The vessel continues its forward course through the stormy night. A sudden lightning strike flashes on the starboard side at 8 seconds, momentarily lighting up the turbulent ocean surface before returning to darkness. The radar continues its steady sweep as the ship maintains heading through the rough seas.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous view from a ship's bridge as a steady nighttime cruise through a storm is momentarily interrupted by a flash of lightning. It begins with the vessel cutting through dark, turbulent waters, where the primary illumination comes from the artificial glow of three navigation monitors displaying rotating radar and chart data. As the ship maintains its forward course through the rough seas, the steady sweep of the radar continues to track the environment. The scene then shifts abruptly when a sudden lightning strike flashes across the starboard side, momentarily illuminating the churning ocean surface before the world returns to deep darkness.
